subcodes.first_line: O Mohsen! He before Whom every possessor of gracious beauty boweth low maketh mention of thee. Blessed is he that hath carried out what was enjoined upon him by God. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محسن یذکرک من خضع له کل ذی حسن بدیع من عمل ما امر به من لدی الله انه هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
